summary_oneline: Port flowtask's LeadIQ GraphQL component into ai-parrot-tools as a LeadIQ toolkit for structured company/employee extraction.

localization.role: source to port: GraphQL queries + response flatteners
closest pattern analog + non-duplicate scraping variant

constraints.text: Tools return LLM-consumable structured data (dict/JSON/ToolResult), not a pandas DataFrame; the flowtask DataFrame assembly + FlowComponent input plumbing must be dropped.
GraphQL POST must use in-repo HTTPService (aiohttp) via session(); no requests/httpx.
API key read via navconfig config.get('LEADIQ_API_KEY'); auth header 'Authorization: Basic {key}' + 'apollo-require-preflight: true'.
Register the tool in TOOL_REGISTRY as a manual entry ('leadiq'); generator preserves manual entries.
Keep distinct from existing scrape_leadiq (Google+Selenium scraping); place in its own leadiq/ module.

whats_new: Pydantic input model (company_name) + structured output models
non_goals: Do not remove/modify CompanyInfoToolkit.scrape_leadiq (scraping variant stays)
No pandas DataFrame return / no flowtask FlowComponent coupling

recommended_next_command.rationale: Localization and patterns are high-confidence and the scope is a well-bounded port; a spec can lock down the toolkit-vs-single-tool choice and the return contract.

unknowns.question: Expose as a LeadIQToolkit with three tools (search_company/employees/flat) or a single LeadIQTool with a search_type arg?
Return contract: structured dict/JSON records (recommended, LLM-friendly) vs list-of-records mirroring the flowtask DataFrame rows?
Is LEADIQ_API_KEY expected to be pre-Base64-encoded for the 'Basic' header (flowtask passes it raw), or should the tool encode 'apiKey:' itself?
unknowns.user_answer: Already Base64-encoded; inject verbatim as 'Basic {LEADIQ_API_KEY}'. Stored in .env.

claims.text: Source is a GraphQL client with 3 query types over api.leadiq.com/graphql
AbstractToolkit + @tool_schema is the right host pattern (CompanyInfoToolkit analog)
HTTPService.session ports the POST transport verbatim (async, aiohttp)
Return contract must change from DataFrame to structured data
Toolkit-with-3-tools is preferable to a single tool for LLM clarity
No existing LeadIQ API client exists; only a scraping variant
